product_overview: LokBhasha helps users understand Marathi government documents by producing glossary-aware canonical English and then optionally localizing that English into selected Indian languages. The app supports browser-side PDF preparation, pasted-text input, glossary-linked context, and on-demand follow-up outputs.
core_goals: Convert Marathi government documents into a clear, glossary-aware canonical English representation
Accept Marathi input via browser-prepared PDF or pasted text and run a single analysis pipeline
Highlight and expose glossary-backed terminology and localization context so users can inspect official term matches
Provide optional, on-demand Indian-language outputs, explanations, and key actions without rerunning the full analysis
Surface setup and quality context so users can evaluate localization choices and glossary readiness

features.name: Live sample run
features.description: Run a curated Marathi example through the full analysis pipeline to see an end-to-end result without providing your own document.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Trigger the live sample run -> Wait for the loading overlay while the document is analyzed -> Land on /result and review the generated canonical English and context panels

features.name: PDF and pasted text analysis
features.description: Prepare a Marathi PDF in the browser or paste Marathi text, then send that content through glossary detection and canonical localization to produce side-by-side results.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Provide a Marathi PDF or paste Marathi text -> Start analysis -> Wait for processing to complete -> Land on /result and view side-by-side Marathi and canonical English
Navigate to / -> Attempt to start analysis without providing PDF or text -> See a validation error preventing analysis

features.name: On-demand follow-up outputs
features.description: After the core analysis, request additional outputs such as translations into selected Indian languages, plain explanations, or extracted key actions; these are generated only when explicitly requested.
user_flows: Navigate to /result with a completed analysis -> Open the language selector and choose one or more target languages -> Request generation of the selected language outputs -> Wait for the new outputs to be added to the result view -> Review the newly added Indian-language outputs
Navigate to /result with a completed analysis -> Request a plain explanation or key actions output -> Wait for the explanation or actions to appear -> Review the explanation or key actions section

features.name: Glossary-linked result inspection
features.description: Inspect glossary-backed highlights and supporting metadata to understand which government terms were detected and how they influenced the canonical English and quality assessments.
user_flows: Navigate to /result with a completed analysis -> Hover over glossary-backed terms in the Marathi or canonical English panel -> Inspect glossary matches and localization context shown in the panel -> Open /result/details to view expanded setup, glossary context, and quality checks -> Optionally navigate to /demo/glossary to view the read-only glossary status

routes.description: Landing page with live sample entry, browser-side PDF preparation, and pasted Marathi text analysis.
Primary result view showing original Marathi, canonical English, glossary context, and optional outputs.
Expanded detail view for localization, glossary, and quality context.
Hidden read-only glossary status page for admin and demo use.

features.name: Live sample run
features.description: Runs a curated Marathi example through the full analysis pipeline for quick demo access.
user_interactions: Click the Try live sample entry point.
Wait for the loading overlay while the document is analyzed.
Review the generated canonical English and context panels on the result page.

features.name: PDF and pasted text analysis
features.description: Accepts a Marathi PDF or pasted text, prepares PDF content in the browser, then sends it through glossary detection and canonical localization.
user_interactions: Upload a Marathi PDF file or paste Marathi text.
See validation errors if no input is provided or the upload is invalid.
View the final side-by-side result after processing completes.

features.name: On-demand follow-up outputs
features.description: Generates optional Indian language outputs, explanation text, and key actions only when explicitly requested.
user_interactions: Open the language selector and choose one or more target languages.
Click to generate selected language outputs.
Request plain explanation or key actions separately.
Review the newly added output sections without rerunning the full analysis.

features.name: Glossary-linked result inspection
features.description: Highlights government terms in the source and canonical text using the local glossary and shows setup and quality context.
user_interactions: Hover over glossary-backed terms in the Marathi or English panel.
Inspect glossary matches, localization context, setup summary, and quality checks.
Open the details page for a fuller context view.

known_limitations.issue: The hidden glossary page is read-only and does not edit the authoritative Lingo glossary.
known_limitations.impact: Operators can inspect glossary status but must manage glossary changes outside the app.

known_limitations.issue: Browser-side PDF preparation can be slower for large or image-heavy documents.
known_limitations.impact: Upload analysis may take longer than pasted-text analysis and is sensitive to browser execution limits.
